falsifier: The cited probes no longer show requested_model vs actual_model mismatch, or the returned metadata trail cannot be replayed.
threat_model_scope: Provider-returned metadata only; excludes provider intent, hidden identity beyond returned metadata, and behavior outside the recorded runs.
public_note: Narrow auditable observation lane: HeliX preserved three requested-vs-returned mismatches with digests, latency and lineage.
claim_boundary: The detector is explicit requested_model != actual_model comparison. This is not a proof of provider intent or hidden model identity.
